rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no bearing on Educ. Code §38.0141, which governs school district reporting of physical education and student health data. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Each school district shall provide to the agency information as required by the commissioner, including statistics and data, relating to student health and physical activity
_note: No conflict; rule concerns PE reporting, unrelated to homestead exemption.
